category.scope_note: Electric vehicle charger comparison for China-to-Sri Lanka export compliance.

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Sri Lanka SLSI standards, IEC 61851 charging system safety, connector compatibility (IEC 62196 vs GB/T 20234), CEB grid-connection requirements, Sri Lanka EV policy, 50 Hz grid parameters, and EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与斯里兰卡SLSI标准、IEC 61851充电系统安全、充电接口兼容性（IEC 62196与GB/T 20234）、CEB并网要求、斯里兰卡电动汽车政策、50 Hz电网参数和EMC要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與斯里蘭卡SLSI標準、IEC 61851充電系統安全、充電接口兼容性（IEC 62196與GB/T 20234）、CEB併網要求、斯里蘭卡電動汽車政策、50 Hz電網參數和EMC要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLSI scope determination, PUCSL or CEB grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Sri Lanka SLSI, PUCSL, CEB, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLSI适用范围裁定、PUCSL或CEB并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLSI適用範圍裁定、PUCSL或CEB併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Sri Lanka, IEC 61851-1 charging system compliance is the primary safety baseline expected by SLSI and project stakeholders. A critical connector mismatch exists: Sri Lanka follows IEC 62196 connector standards while Chinese domestic chargers use GB/T 20234, making direct deployment of China-spec connectors incompatible with IEC 62196-compliant vehicles. CEB grid-connection review is required for public or commercial chargers. Sri Lanka's National Electric Vehicle Policy creates demand but does not yet specify a domestic certification scheme — importers should confirm current SLSI registration or type-approval requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口斯里兰卡时，IEC 61851-1充电系统合规是SLSI及项目各方期望的主要安全基线。存在关键接口不兼容问题：斯里兰卡遵循IEC 62196接口标准，而中国国内充电设备采用GB/T 20234，中国规格接口无法直接用于IEC 62196兼容车辆。公共或商业充电设备须进行CEB并网审查。斯里兰卡《国家电动汽车政策》带来市场需求，但尚未规定国内认证制度——进口商在出货前应确认当前SLSI注册或型式批准要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口斯里蘭卡時，IEC 61851-1充電系統合規是SLSI及項目各方期望的主要安全基線。存在關鍵接口不兼容問題：斯里蘭卡遵循IEC 62196接口標準，而中國國內充電設備採用GB/T 20234，中國規格接口無法直接用於IEC 62196兼容車輛。公共或商業充電設備須進行CEB併網審查。斯里蘭卡《國家電動汽車政策》帶來市場需求，但尚未規定國內認證制度——進口商在出貨前應確認當前SLSI注冊或型式批准要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
